verse.name: v1
verse.lines: She was a virgin Bride to be And one night as she lay quietly, The Spirit of the Lord o'er shadowed her And said that you'll conceive a child that sin cannot defile And she said, "Be it unto me according to Thy Word."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And she kept these things and pondered them deep within her heart She believed in God when He said That something new was going to start If the Word could be born in Mary It can certainly be born in you and me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we're a virgin Bride to be saved through the Blood of Calvary And in this time of darkness He has come Revealed a vindicated Word that we all have heard And I can see It being born in you and me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Cause we've kept these things and pondered them deep within our hearts We've stayed with the Word Never one time felt desire to depart Yes the Word had been born in Mary And I can see It being born in you and me
